news.title: BioCryst 放弃眼科候选药物，专注于罕见疾病
news.summary: 该公司宣布已完成血浆激肽释放酶抑制剂的开发，该抑制剂正在研究用于治疗糖尿病性黄斑水肿。
news.content: 该公司宣布已完成血浆激肽释放酶抑制剂的开发，该抑制剂正在研究用于治疗糖尿病性黄斑水肿。
news.original_title: BioCryst scraps eye candidate to focus on rare diseases
news.original_summary: The company announced it has concluded development of the plasma kallikrein inhibitor, which was being studied to treat diabetic macular edema.
